attributes.description: Dashboard monitoring GitGuardian internal secret alerts across Protect, Detect, and Remediate dimensions.

query.esql:
FROM .ds-logs-gitguardian.internal_secret_alert-default-2026.07.02-000001
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS internal_repositories_monitored = COUNT_DISTINCT(gitguardian.incident.id)

FROM .ds-logs-gitguardian.internal_secret_alert-default-2026.07.02-000001
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS internal_repositories_monitored = COUNT_DISTINCT(gitguardian.incident.id)

FROM .ds-logs-gitguardian.internal_secret_alert-default-2026.07.02-000001
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE gitguardian.incident.severity == "critical"
| STATS count = COUNT(*)

FROM .ds-logs-gitguardian.internal_secret_alert-default-2026.07.02-000001
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| WHERE gitguardian.incident.severity == "critical"
| STATS count = COUNT(*)

FROM .ds-logs-gitguardian.internal_secret_alert-default-2026.07.02-000001
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
  AND gitguardian.incident.severity == "critical"
  AND gitguardian.incident.status == "RESOLVED"
| EVAL triggered_at_dt = DATE_PARSE("yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSSSS'Z'", gitguardian.incident.triggered_at)
| EVAL days_to_remediate = DATE_DIFF("day", triggered_at_dt, @timestamp)
| STATS median_days_to_remediate = MEDIAN(days_to_remediate)

FROM .ds-logs-gitguardian.internal_secret_alert-default-2026.07.02-000001
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
  AND gitguardian.incident.severity == "critical"
  AND gitguardian.incident.status == "RESOLVED"
| EVAL triggered_at_dt = DATE_PARSE("yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSSSS'Z'", gitguardian.incident.triggered_at)
| EVAL days_to_remediate = DATE_DIFF("day", triggered_at_dt, @timestamp)
| STATS median_days_to_remediate = MEDIAN(days_to_remediate)

FROM .ds-logs-gitguardian.internal_secret_alert-default-2026.07.02-000001
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS unique_incidents = COUNT_DISTINCT(gitguardian.incident.id) BY week = BUCKET(@timestamp, 1 week)
| SORT week ASC

FROM .ds-logs-gitguardian.internal_secret_alert-default-2026.07.02-000001
| WHERE @timestamp >= ?_tstart AND @timestamp < ?_tend
| STATS unique_incidents = COUNT_DISTINCT(gitguardian.incident.id) BY week = BUCKET(@timestamp, 1 week)
| SORT week ASC

attributes.title: Unique GitGuardian Incidents per Week (Week over Week)

embeddableConfig.title: Unique GitGuardian Incidents per Week (Week over Week)

query.esql:
FROM .ds-logs-gitguardian.internal_secret_alert-default-2026.07.02-000001
| WHERE gitguardian.incident.severity IN ("critical", "high")
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY gitguardian.incident.detector.display_name
| SORT count DESC
| LIMIT 5

FROM .ds-logs-gitguardian.internal_secret_alert-default-2026.07.02-000001
| WHERE gitguardian.incident.severity IN ("critical", "high")
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY gitguardian.incident.detector.display_name
| SORT count DESC
| LIMIT 5

| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY week = BUCKET(@timestamp, 1 week)

query.esql:
FROM .ds-logs-gitguardian.internal_secret_alert-default-2026.07.02-000001
| WHERE gitguardian.incident.severity == "critical"
  AND gitguardian.incident.status == "RESOLVED"
| EVAL triggered_at_dt = TO_DATETIME(gitguardian.incident.triggered_at)
| EVAL remediation_days = DATE_DIFF("day", triggered_at_dt, @timestamp)
| STATS median_remediation_days = MEDIAN(remediation_days) BY week = BUCKET(@timestamp, 1 week)
| SORT week

FROM .ds-logs-gitguardian.internal_secret_alert-default-2026.07.02-000001
| WHERE gitguardian.incident.severity == "critical"
  AND gitguardian.incident.status == "RESOLVED"
| EVAL triggered_at_dt = TO_DATETIME(gitguardian.incident.triggered_at)
| EVAL remediation_days = DATE_DIFF("day", triggered_at_dt, @timestamp)
| STATS median_remediation_days = MEDIAN(remediation_days) BY week = BUCKET(@timestamp, 1 week)
| SORT week

attributes.title: Median Time to Remediate Critical Incidents (Days) per Week

embeddableConfig.title: Median Time to Remediate Critical Incidents (Days) per Week

query.esql:
FROM .ds-logs-gitguardian.internal_secret_alert-default-2026.07.02-000001
| WHERE gitguardian.incident.status == "RESOLVED"
| KEEP gitguardian.incident.id, gitguardian.incident.incident_name, gitguardian.incident.severity, gitguardian.incident.detector.display_name, gitguardian.incident.triggered_at, @timestamp
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| LIMIT 100

FROM .ds-logs-gitguardian.internal_secret_alert-default-2026.07.02-000001
| WHERE gitguardian.incident.status == "RESOLVED"
| KEEP gitguardian.incident.id, gitguardian.incident.incident_name, gitguardian.incident.severity, gitguardian.incident.detector.display_name, gitguardian.incident.triggered_at, @timestamp
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| LIMIT 100

attributes.title: GitGuardian Secret Alerts - Security Overview
